body.title: Vetinari: CP3/CP6 decision audit log per dispatch action
body.result: _audit_log() JSONL append + get_audit_log(); wired into decompose+escalate; 7 tests
body.intention: I intend that every dispatch decision Vetinari makes is logged with a structured 'why' entry so the reasoning is auditable (CP3) and safety escalations are traceable (CP6).
body.description:
CP3: explain each dispatch decision. CP6: safety-conscious escalation. Currently nothing is logged about why Vetinari took a particular routing or escalation decision.

Add _audit_log(event: str, reason: str, context: dict) to VetinariDevice: appends JSONL entry {ts, directive_id, event, reason, context} to ~/.unseen_university/vetinari/audit.jsonl. Wire into: decompose (log 'DECOMPOSE' + confidence score), route (log 'ROUTE' + why), clarification (log 'CLARIFY' + what was ambiguous), escalation (log existing _escalate_to_akien as 'ESCALATE'). Add get_audit_log(directive_id=None) for querying.

**Affected files:** devices/vetinari/device.py (add _audit_log(), get_audit_log()), tests/test_vetinari_audit.py (NEW)
**Design rules:** JSONL (one JSON object per line); audit log is append-only; never delete entries; file at IGOR_HOME/vetinari/audit.jsonl
**Scope boundary:** IN — _audit_log(), JSONL writer, get_audit_log(), wire into decompose/route/clarify/escalate; OUT — UI for browsing audit log, log rotation
**Completion criteria:** _audit_log('ROUTE', 'tag=Build matched claude', {...}) appends valid JSONL; get_audit_log(directive_id='x') returns only entries for x; after decompose_directive() runs, audit.jsonl has ≥1 DECOMPOSE entry; 4+ tests
